FROM example.query.Book b WHERE 1=1
{#if keyword != null && keyword.length > 0}
  AND (b.title LIKE :keyword OR b.description LIKE :keyword OR b.author LIKE :keyword)
{/if}
{#if author != null && author.length > 0}
  AND b.author = :author
{/if}
{#if status != null && status.length > 0}
  AND b.status = :status
{/if}
{#if minYear != null}
  AND b.publicationYear >= :minYear
{/if}
{#if maxYear != null}
  AND b.publicationYear <= :maxYear
{/if}
ORDER BY b.publicationYear DESC, b.title ASC
